title: habenaria cavatibrachia
intro: Habenaria cavatibrachia, also known as the Rough-leaved Habenaria, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Habenaria cavatibrachia are said to include relief from fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as wound healing and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
